name: electrobun-react-tailwind-vite
description: Electrobun app with React, Tailwind CSS, and Vite HMR
author: Arseny Pavlenko

scripts.dev: bun scripts/generate-build-info.ts && bun scripts/generate-changelog.ts && vite build && bun run build:cli && electrobun build && electrobun dev
scripts.build: bun scripts/generate-build-info.ts && bun scripts/generate-changelog.ts && vite build && bun run build:cli && electrobun build
scripts.build:prod: bun scripts/generate-build-info.ts && bun scripts/generate-changelog.ts && vite build && bun run build:cli && electrobun build --channel prod
scripts.start: bun scripts/generate-build-info.ts && bun scripts/generate-changelog.ts && bun run build:cli && electrobun build && electrobun dev
